lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh duneea aavan jaaneea |3|
lines.english: All the world continues coming and going in reincarnation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਸੇਵ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: vich duneea sev kamaaeeai |
lines.english: In the midst of this world, do seva,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਦਰਗਹ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: taa daragah baisan paaeeai |
lines.english: and you shall be given a place of honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਾਹ ਲੁਡਾਈਐ ॥੪॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak baah luddaaeeai |4|33|
lines.english: Says Nanak, swing your arms in joy! ||4||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਨ ਕਾਮਨਾ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur man kaamanaa teerath hai jis no dee bujhaae |
lines.english: The True Guru is the mind's desire and the sacred shrine of pilgrimage, for those unto whom He has given this understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਿ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau satigur sevee aapanaa ik man ik chit bhaae |
lines.english: I serve my True Guru with single-minded devotion, and lovingly focus my consciousness on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਵਣਾ ਜੋ ਇਛੈ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man chindiaa var paavanaa jo ichhai so fal paae |
lines.english: The blessings of the wishes of the mind are obtained, and the fruits of one's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naau dhiaaeeai naau mangeeai naame sehaj samaae |1|
lines.english: Meditate on the Name, worship the Name, and through the Name, you shall be absorbed in intuitive peace and poise. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee guramukh chaakhiaa sahaje rahe samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who have tasted it remain intuitively absorbed in the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੁ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere har ras chaakh tikh jaae |
lines.english: O my mind, drink in the Sublime Essence of the Lord, and your thirst shall be quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinee satigur seviaa tinee paaeaa naam nidhaan |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru obtain the Treasure of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਚੂਕਾ ਮਨਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: antar har ras rav rahiaa chookaa man abhimaan |
lines.english: Deep within, they are drenched with the Essence of the Lord, and the egotistical pride of the mind is subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਲਾਗਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai kamal pragaasiaa laagaa sehaj dhiaan |
lines.english: The heart-lotus blossoms forth, and they intuitively center themselves in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man niramal har rav rahiaa paaeaa darageh maan |2|
lines.english: Their minds become pure, and they remain immersed in the Lord; they are honored in His Court. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਤੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan aapanaa te virale sansaar |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru in this world are very rare.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਨਾ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਗਾ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hau tin kai balihaaranai jinaa naame lagaa piaar |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who are in love with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਮਾਰਿ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa maar kai har raakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: Those who keep the Lord enshrined in their hearts subdue egotism and possessiveness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗੀ ਜਿਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: seee sukhee chahu jugee jinaa naam akhutt apaar |3|
lines.english: Those who attain the Inexhaustible Name of the Infinite Lord remain happy throughout the four ages. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਚੂਕੈ ਮੋਹ ਪਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai naam paaeeai chookai moh piaas |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the Naam is obtained, and the thirst of emotional attachment departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਉਦਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: har setee man rav rahiaa ghar hee maeh udaas |
lines.english: When the mind is permeated with the Lord, one remains detached within the home of the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa har kaa saad aaeaa hau tin balihaarai jaas |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who enjoy the Sublime Taste of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਭੇਖ ਕਰਿ ਭਰਮਾਈਐ ਮਨਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਪਟੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bahu bhekh kar bharamaaeeai man hiradai kapatt kamaae |
lines.english: People wear all sorts of costumes and wander all around, but in their hearts and minds, they practice deception.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥੪॥੧॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai sach naam gunataas |4|1|34|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Glance of Grace, the True Name, the Treasure of Excellence, is obtained. ||4||1||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਈ ਮਰਿ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kaa mehal na paavee mar visattaa maeh samaae |1|
lines.english: They do not attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, and after death, they sink into manure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਉਦਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: man re grih hee maeh udaas |
lines.english: O mind, remain detached in the midst of your household.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਜੀਤਿਆ ਗਤਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਘਰੈ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad man jeetiaa gat mukat gharai meh paae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the mind is conquered, and one attains the State of Liberation in one's own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach sanjam karanee so kare guramukh hoe paragaas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Practicing truth, self-discipline and good deeds, the Gurmukh is enlightened. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam dhiaaeeai satasangat mel milaae |2|
lines.english: So meditate on the Name of the Lord; join and merge with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲਖ ਇਸਤਰੀਆ ਭੋਗ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਰਾਜੁ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: je lakh isatareea bhog kareh nav khandd raaj kamaeh |
lines.english: You may enjoy the pleasures of hundreds of thousands of women, and rule the nine continents of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin satagur sukh na paavee fir fir jonee paeh |3|
lines.english: But without the True Guru, you will not find peace; you will be reincarnated over and over again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਪਿਛੈ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਓਨਾ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tinaa pichhai ridh sidh firai onaa til na tamaae |4|
lines.english: -wealth and supernatural spiritual powers follow them, but they do not care for such things at all. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਾਰੁ ਕੰਠਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਪਹਿਰਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har haar kantth jinee pahiriaa gur charanee chit laae |
lines.english: Those who wear the Necklace of the Lord around their necks, and focus their consciousness on the Guru's Feet

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੫॥੨॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak jeevai naam lai har devahu sehaj subhaae |5|2|35|
lines.english: Servant Nanak lives by chanting the Naam. O Lord, please give it to me, in Your Natural Way. ||5||2||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo prabh bhaavai so theeai avar na karanaa jaae |
lines.english: Whatever pleases God's Will comes to pass. Nothing else can be done.
